ocr.text: In the rapidly evolving landscape of North American e-commerce, the growth of subscription memberships has become a focal
point for companies seeking to enhance customer loyalty and drive revenue. Coupang, a leading player in this sector, has
demonstrated significant advancements in its subscription model, as evidenced by various operational metrics outlined in the
accompanying data table. Notably, the company's commitment to improving its service efficiency is reflected in the
OperationalMetrics, with an impressive AverageResponseTime(hrs) of 220K, showcasing their dedication to timely customer
support. This focus on responsiveness not only enhances customer satisfaction but also correlates with reduced

CustomerAcquisitionCost, which is critical for maintaining a competitive edge in the marketplace. 

Furthermore, the retention of
existing members plays a crucial role in overall growth; Coupang's retention rate stands at 95%, indicating a robust loyalty
among its subscriber base. The metrics reveal that the company's strategies have yielded a ResolvedTickets count of 80K,
emphasizing effective problem resolution as a cornerstone of their customer service approach. This level of customer
engagement is bolstered by an AverageTenure(Months) of 30K, suggesting that members tend to remain subscribed for

extended periods, thereby contributing to a stable revenue stream.

The financial implications of this membership growth are
also significant, with an increase in revenue projected to reach $100M, driven largely by the expanding subscriber base. With a
reported growth rate of 20% year-over-year, it is evident that Coupang is not only capturing new customers but also enhancing
the value proposition for existing members. The strategic initiatives employed by Coupang reflect a comprehensive
understanding of market dynamics and consumer behavior, positioning the company favorably for sustained growth in the

competitive e-commerce landscape.

As we analyze these metrics, it is critical to recognize the interconnectedness of customer
acquisition and retention strategies. The effective management of CustomerAcquisitionCost is paramount as the company seeks
to balance its growth initiatives with sustainable financial practices. The data underscores the importance of operational
efficiency, as the correlation between resolved customer inquiries and overall membership satisfaction cannot be overlooked. In
conclusion, Coupang's subscription membership growth demonstrates a well-executed strategy that leverages operational
excellence and customer engagement, ultimately driving long-term success in the e-commerce marketplace.
